zh.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter是Björn (tre vingar)的女兒，出生。她和Bengt Karlsson Färla至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter是Björn (tre vingar)的女儿，出生。她和Bengt Karlsson Färla至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Brita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Britt
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

en.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter was born as the daughter of Björn (tre vingar). She had at least 1 daughter with Bengt Karlsson Färla.

fr.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter est née, fille de Björn (tre vingar). Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Bengt Karlsson Färla.

de.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter wurde, als Tochter von Björn (tre vingar) geboren. Sie hatte mit Bengt Karlsson Färla mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter è nata il come figlia di Björn (tre vingar). Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Bengt Karlsson Färla.

ja.lifeSummary: Brita BjörnsdotterはBjörn (tre vingar)の娘として生まれた。彼女はBengt Karlsson Färlaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter(은)는 Björn (tre vingar)의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Bengt Karlsson Färla(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter nasceu filha de Björn (tre vingar). Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Bengt Karlsson Färla.

ru.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter родилась. Её отца звали Björn (tre vingar). У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Bengt Karlsson Färla.

es.lifeSummary: Brita Björnsdotter nació como hija de Björn (tre vingar). Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Bengt Karlsson Färla.
